channel.title: mostly.codes
channel.description: Personal blog of Tobias Roland. Writing about people, processes, and technology.

item.title: Modern communication is an inverse zipfile (LLM culture)
item.description: How LLM-mediated communication creates a lossy inverse zipfile effect, eroding trust and signal quality in how we talk to each other.

item.title: Rethinking how I blog (Technically)
item.description: Moving from Jekyll to hand-rolled HTML and CSS — finding joy in reducing cognitive overhead and embracing brutalist web design.

item.title: GCP Cloud Functions with Scala.js in 10 lines(ish)
item.description: A guide to creating GCP Cloud Functions with Scala.js in approximately 10 lines of code.

item.title: Scale by the Bay 2019
item.description: A recap of attending the Scale by the Bay 2019 conference in San Francisco — talks on Scala, functional programming, ZIO, and Unison.

item.title: I quit my job to study what I'm passionate about
item.description: Taking time off to study functional programming, Scala, and category theory — quitting a stable job to focus on what I care about.
